name: focus-writer
description: Minimal distraction-free writing app with Matrix theme

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w apps/server & npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/server
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w apps/server && npm run type-check -w apps/web
